style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails drift upward like stardust, dissolving into iridescent petal-shaped particles that shimmer with soft pastel hues. A delicate, pearlescent aura surrounds the body in a gentle oval shape, emitting a warm lavender glow that pulses faintly with each movement. The lighting mood is serene and dreamy, bathed in soft pink and pale gold light that refracts subtly around the wings, creating a halo of shimmering musical note vibrations. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
